# P-E-002 — Indirect sanctioned-entity exposure

> Exposition indirecte à une entité sanctionnée

## Description (EN)

A related party of the bidder (subsidiary, sibling, common shareholder) is on a sanctions list.

## Description (FR)

Une partie liée du soumissionnaire (filiale, société sœur, actionnaire commun) figure sur une liste de sanctions.

<!-- END auto-generated -->

## Detection logic

Indirect sanctioned exposure — sanctioned entity is N-hops away in the entity graph (N=2 or 3 typically). Less conclusive than direct but still significant.

## Likelihood-ratio reasoning

Default prior 0.40 + weight 0.85.

## Known false-positive traps

- **Coincidental graph proximity** through legitimate intermediate entities.

## Production wiring

✅ Production-ready. Same chain as P-E-001 plus the graph-traversal substrate.
